summary: The standard actuarial text on interest theory: accumulation and discount, annuities-certain and their present values, amortization schedules and sinking funds. Chapter 5 develops exactly the loan-amortization identities this module enforces -- the level payment P*i/(1-(1+i)^-n), interest-then-principal splitting, and the balance recursion that terminates at zero.
title: The Theory of Interest
